description_long: This is a large, round metal wok with a wide, deep basin and two sturdy looped handles on opposite sides. The wok features a matching metal lid with a rectangular handle, which can be placed on top or set aside. The surface of the wok is matte and shows signs of wear, with some discoloration and minor scuff marks, suggesting frequent use. The interior is spacious and slightly rough, suitable for cooking large quantities of food. The handles are robust and designed for easy lifting, even when the wok is full. The overall appearance is utilitarian, making it well-suited for both indoor and outdoor urban cooking scenarios.
description: A large, round metal wok with two looped handles and a matching lid, showing signs of wear and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the closed lid with a rectangular handle and both side handles partially visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view with the lid propped open, revealing the deep interior and one prominent side handle.
description_view_2: Front view with the lid set behind the wok, clearly displaying the spacious interior and both looped handles.
description_view_3: Angled view with the lid resting on the ground, showing the interior and one side handle in profile.
